title: Offer diagnosis sample
text:
Most businesses think they have a traffic problem, but they actually have an offer problem.

The Value Equation has four parts: dream outcome, perceived likelihood of achievement, time delay, and effort and sacrifice.

Step 1: Make the dream outcome specific.
Step 2: Increase perceived likelihood with proof.
Step 3: Reduce time delay.
Step 4: Reduce effort and sacrifice.

"Fix the offer before you scale ads."
